name: Spoofy Alpha Version
subtitle: A native iOS DPI bypass tool inspired by SpoofDPI
description: this is an alpha version of Spoofy, it's recommended to use the stable version: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ringolol/Spoofy/main/altstore/altsource.json

apps.name: Spoofy
apps.localizedDescription: A native iOS DPI bypass tool. Spoofy runs a local proxy that intercepts HTTPS connections and fragments TLS ClientHello packets, preventing DPI engines from reading the SNI and blocking your traffic.
